notes: CLOSED 2026-04-20. Next.js 16 public site — third public artifact after FitTracker2 and fitme-showcase. Shipped in one session (2h) via superpowers brainstorming → writing-plans → subagent-driven-development, followed by two iterative tweak sessions (SSR regression fix, /pm-flow + DispatchReplay + glossary additions, visual polish, animation timing hunt, case-studies index redesign, 7 standard-tier studies promoted to Flagship with a shared chart library). 89 commits, 44 pre-rendered routes, 45 MDX content files, 10 Flagship case studies, Lighthouse 100 a11y maintained. Open items (external audit content, ai-product-patterns URL) are blocked on external input, not framework work.

ux_or_integration.compliance_decision: editorial base + FitMe accents — editorial typography, FitMe palette

testing.lighthouse_real_run: 100 a11y maintained on homepage and /pm-flow; 96 perf mobile homepage

review.review_mode: pragmatic — formal code-quality review on substantive code only, inline verification on mechanical tasks

merge.merge_strategy: direct commits to main on new external repo (no feature branches — solo dev, fresh repo, bootstrap context)

outcomes: Third public artifact shipped — Next.js 16 site with 44 pre-rendered routes and 10 Flagship case studies
Production deploy stable at https://fitme-story.vercel.app with Vercel auto-deploy on push to main
Lighthouse a11y 100 maintained on homepage and /pm-flow through iterative fix passes
Shared chart-component library (6 components) validated across 10 case studies — pattern replicable for future content
Framework timing/animation behavior characterized across 5 LegoBrick iterations — layout='position' + two-stage state is the pattern for 'expand-in-place' grid cells
Case studies index condensed from 17 entries / 4 tiers to 6 milestones + 11 compact + 3 appendix — better signal-to-noise
SSR regression caught and resolved in the same session with a two-layer persona hook split — now a canonical reference for useSearchParams + Suspense + SSG interactions
blocked_on_external: /trust page placeholders — which AI models audit, cadence, first audit results link (awaiting user content)
Meta-audit case study — awaits external audit completion
ai-product-patterns/SKILL.md URL — awaiting upstream URL from user
backlog: Live filtering on /pm-flow Lego Wall (phase pip click → filter wall)
Per-brick sparklines showing skill activity over time (needs live data pipeline)
